description: Accounts for wine production, submitted by Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to his father Eliyyahu the Judge. Similar to T-S Ar.18(1).127. This document is for the month of Av (year not specified), while T-S Ar.18(1).127 is for the month of Tishrei 1230 CE.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בMTA.
